items.title: How Miro is redefining collaboration across the product development life cycle
items.summary: Miro cofounder and CEO Andrey Khusid reflects on the company’s evolution from a digital whiteboard to an AI-powered workflow platform—and how AI is reshaping competitive advantage in software.

items.summary: New McKinsey research explains why organizations that repeatedly build new ventures outperform those that approach innovation as a one-off effort.

items.summary: Artificial intelligence is reshaping film and TV production from script to screen—but the biggest disruptions may not be the ones anyone is predicting.

items.title: Closing the women’s health gap: The United Kingdom’s £36 billion opportunity
items.summary: Closing the women’s health gap in the United Kingdom could result in ten more healthy days of life per year for every woman—and potentially boost the country’s economy by £36 billion annually by 2040.

items.title: Betsy Nabel on physicians and women in healthcare leadership roles
items.summary: Betsy Nabel, a leader and advocate for women in healthcare, reflects on the moves she’s made in her career to stay true to herself while creating lasting impact for medical students and patients.

items.summary: In striving for business growth while creating value for society, Suphachai Chearavanont has based his leadership strategy on looking beyond short-term gains to sustainable social impact and scale.

items.title: Colocation data centers: The infrastructure race behind AI
items.summary: Data center capital expenditures are surging as AI workloads grow, yet competitiveness increasingly depends on securing advanced accelerators, reliable electricity, and fast project delivery.
